cve_description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in libahttp/err.c in OkCupid OKWS (OK Web Server) allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the PATH_INFO to a non-existent page, which is not properly handled in a 404 error page.

Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the WddxPacket::recursiveAddVar function in HHVM (aka the HipHop Virtual Machine) before 3.5.0 allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via a crafted string to the wddx_serialize_value function.

added: Log::Msg temp = { msgCounter++, QDateTime::currentMSecsSinceEpoch(), type, Utils::String::toHtmlEscaped(message) };
deleted: Log::Msg temp = { msgCounter++, QDateTime::currentMSecsSinceEpoch(), type, message };

cve_description: WebUI in qBittorrent before 3.3.11 did not escape many values, which could potentially lead to XSS.

added: Log::Peer temp = { peerCounter++, QDateTime::currentMSecsSinceEpoch(), Utils::String::toHtmlEscaped(ip), blocked, Utils::String::toHtmlEscaped(reason) };
deleted: Log::Peer temp = { peerCounter++, QDateTime::currentMSecsSinceEpoch(), ip, blocked, reason };

cve_description: WebUI in qBittorrent before 3.3.11 did not escape many values, which could potentially lead to XSS.

added: label->setText(tr("Are you sure you want to delete '%1' from the transfer list?", "Are you sure you want to delete 'ubuntu-linux-iso' from the transfer list?").arg(Utils::String::toHtmlEscaped(name)));
deleted: label->setText(tr("Are you sure you want to delete '%1' from the transfer list?", "Are you sure you want to delete 'ubuntu-linux-iso' from the transfer list?").arg(name));
